description: First full live paid-API benchmark run: 3 checkpoints (20/50/100% of 32-doc corpus) x 3 arms (hivemind, vector_rag, graphrag_lite) x 32 queries, real judge scoring.
interpreter: agents/.venv/bin/python (protobuf 6.33.6 -- must match generated gRPC gencode; system anaconda python has protobuf 5.29.6 and will fail with a VersionError)
